description:
Log in to NOSH ChartingSystem as an administrator and update the practice contact information for 'Hillside Family Medicine'.

Login Credentials:
- Username: admin
- Password: Admin1234!

New Practice Details:
- Street Address: 250 Elm Street, Suite 300
- City: Northampton
- Zip: 01060
- Phone: 413-555-9876
- Fax: 413-555-9877
- Email: office@hillsidefm.com

Constraints:
- Do NOT change the Practice Name ('Hillside Family Medicine').
- Do NOT change the State ('MA').
- Ensure all other settings remain as they are.
